chunks.title: Maharat Celebrates the Graduation of Its October 2022 intake
chunks.chunk_text:

On October 5, 2023, Maharat Construction Training Center held a graduation ceremony for its October 2022 intake.

chunks.title: Maharat Celebrates the Graduation of Its October 2022 intake
chunks.chunk_text: On October 5, 2023, Maharat Construction Training Center held a graduation ceremony for its October 2022 intake. A total of 136 graduates celebrated the completion of their 12-month Associate Diploma Programs; Welding, Pipefitting, Electrical, Instrumentation and Safety. Trainees’ parents and representatives from the sponsoring companies attended the ceremony. During the event, trainees with outstanding performance and distinguished staff members were recognized by Maharat’s management. This cohort will hopefully contribute to supporting Saudization and enhancing the level of national growth in the construction sector.
